plans.shortCopy: Batch cloud sync every minute for one Codex device.
plans.privacyCopy: Syncs abstract MCP Miner game progress only, not prompts, code, files, terminal output, or transcripts.
plans.progressionCopy: Does not boost mining output, payouts, rarity, or order progress.
